title: react-nouislider@1.13.0 breaks build 🚨
body:
Hello lovely humans, [react-nouislider](https://www.npmjs.com/package/react-nouislider) just published its new version 1.13.0.
State Failing tests :rotating_light:
Dependency react-nouislider
New version 1.13.0
Type dependency
This version is **covered** by your **current version range** and after updating it in your project **the build went from success to failure**. As react-nouislider is a direct dependency of this project **this is very likely breaking your project right now**. If other packages depend on you it’s very likely also breaking them. I recommend you give this issue a very high priority. I’m sure you can resolve this :muscle: Of course this could just be a false positive, caused by a flaky test suite, or third parties that are currently broken or unavailable, but that would be another problem I’d recommend working on. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- The new version differs by 6 commits . - [`e95e80f`](https://github.com/algolia/react-nouislider/commit/e95e80f07791fbcb2f30d7a6f5400653d14c10b2) 1.13.0 - [`f057aee`](https://github.com/algolia/react-nouislider/commit/f057aee9fe4c9d5e40b3ab2a9275a9e94115a9cc) feat(nouislider): use noUiSlider directly - [`135ffb2`](https://github.com/algolia/react-nouislider/commit/135ffb242731ffb772f6568b9cbe3b1b5fb92a4b) Bump to 1.12.0 - [`91a5347`](https://github.com/algolia/react-nouislider/commit/91a5347a4b4d040f37dca452b6238ca83cab321b) Merge pull request #27 from d-winter/start-end-events - [`37cd910`](https://github.com/algolia/react-nouislider/commit/37cd910821305e8249c230f56b0133a42c918a8e) added events onStart + onEnd (refs #26) - [`a39028b`](https://github.com/algolia/react-nouislider/commit/a39028bcbbdd2b5d198de66dfaadd3835b3a5933) Update README.md See the [full diff](https://github.com/algolia/react-nouislider/compare/a90f7c309597249d8a579085eac678b85ec86142...e95e80f07791fbcb2f30d7a6f5400653d14c10b2). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](https://greenkeeper.io/). Tired of seeing this sponsor message? :zap: `greenkeeper upgrade`
